label: Transparent clematis bloom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Clematis transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a clematis bloom motif for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A complete clematis bloom with six to eight precise violet petals, subtle petal veins, cream filament stamens, a small green botanical center, and a few restrained dark olive vine/leaf hints. Accurate clematis flower form, crisp natural edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the bloom, petals, stamens, or vine hints.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves violet petal texture, cream filaments, and natural botanical detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for local background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or edge vignette. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the flower, leaves, vines, or center.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no trellis, no pot, no hand, no vase, no landscape, no second bloom, no insects, no decorative frame.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Clematis light-mode design-system board, regenerated for larger 16:9 source quality
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named "Morphous Clematis", derived from the clematis bloom motif shown earlier: violet petals, cream filament stamens, olive-green vine leaves, and climbing trellis structure.
Canvas: STRICT wide 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160. Do not make a portrait or square image. Fill the full horizontal canvas with a precise design-system layout.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide if available, large readable labels, restrained density, crisp portfolio-system grid, no tiny token tables.
Design mood: precise portfolio system for curators, case studies, asset libraries, client work, visual archives, and editorial project dashboards.
Required visible sections: Morphous Clematis title, Clematis Bloom motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, portfolio cards, project detail panel, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metrics, small charts, data table, command palette/search overlay, form states, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, generated asset thumbnails.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable roles: background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart colors, sidebar colors, radius.
Palette roles: petal ivory background, inked vine foreground, clematis violet primary, petal shadow purple accent, cream filament surfaces, pollen focus ring, trellis green secondary, leaf vein muted, warm stem border, precise neutral chart colors from the motif.
Typography: English portfolio UI guidance plus Japanese typography examples for project titles, labels, metadata, tables, navigation, and body text. Include readable Japanese sample labels.
Visual details: angular petal geometry, subtle vein texture, trellis-like alignment guides, cream filament dividers, crisp 8px radii, light airy surfaces, exact portfolio spacing.
Text constraints: short readable labels only.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple-blue gradients, no stock UI kit, no misspelling of Morphous Clematis, no watermark, no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Clematis dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named "Morphous Clematis" that feels like the light board shown earlier translated to dark mode, not a new unrelated theme.
Reference use: Preserve the same clematis motif language: violet petals, cream filament stamens, olive-green vine leaves, climbing trellis alignment, subtle petal vein texture, precise portfolio-system components.
Canvas: exact 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160, high-resolution source asset, no device frame.
Resolution and legibility: large readable section labels, restrained density, crisp grid, no tiny token tables. Use polished product-design-system board presentation, not marketing art.
Design mood: precise portfolio system for curators, case studies, asset libraries, client work, visual archives, and editorial project dashboards.
Required visible sections: Morphous Clematis title, Dark Mode, Clematis Bloom motif story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, portfolio cards, project detail panel, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metrics, small charts, data table, command palette/search overlay, form states, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing/radius/border/shadow tokens, generated asset thumbnails.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn CSS-variable roles including background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart colors, sidebar colors, and radius.
Dark palette roles: deep vine ink background, night petal surface, luminous cream filament foreground, clematis violet primary, lavender focus ring, trellis green secondary, leaf vein muted, warm stem border, restrained chart accents derived from motif colors.
Typography: English portfolio UI guidance plus Japanese typography examples for dark-mode project titles, labels, metadata, tables, navigation, and body text. Include readable Japanese sample labels.
Visual details: dark botanical paper surfaces, fine petal-vein texture, trellis-like alignment guides, cream filament dividers, crisp 8px radii, accessible contrast, exact portfolio spacing, subtle glows only for focus rings.
Text constraints: use short readable interface labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple-blue gradient, no stock UI kit, no misspelling of Morphous Clematis, no watermark, no illegible microtext.
